name: Foe Gyre
implicitMods: Item sells for much more to vendors
explicitMods: 60% of Hit Damage from you and your Minions cannot be Reflected
craftedMods: Non-Channelling Skills have -8 to Total Mana Cost
flavourText: Metallic thoughts whisper in the dark.

name: Onslaught Hold
implicitMods: Inflict Lightning Exposure on Hit, applying -15% to Lightning Resistance
Non-Vaal Strike Skills target 2 additional nearby Enemies

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that increases the movement speed, attack speed and cast speed of you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 16% increased Movement Speed
You and nearby allies gain 25% increased Cast Speed
You and nearby allies gain 25% increased Attack Speed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants elemental resistances and elemental ailment immunity to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain +40% to all Elemental Resistances
You and nearby allies are Immune to all Elemental Ailments
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants additional energy shield and increased energy shield recharge rate to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 221 additional Energy Shield
You and nearby Allies gain 30% increased Energy Shield Recharge Rate
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Sol Shell
implicitMods: 20% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills
fracturedMods: Armour is increased by Overcapped Fire Resistance

properties.name: Attack, Projectile, Melee, Strike, Lightning, Chaining

socketedItems.secDescrText: Infuses your melee weapon with electrical energies as you swing. In addition to converting some of your physical damage to lightning damage, the stored energy is released from the weapon as a projectile as you strike, flying out to hit farther-away enemies and chain between them. The projectile cannot miss if the melee attack hit a target.
socketedItems.builtInSupport: Supported by Level 1 Greater Multiple Projectiles
explicitMods: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
Projectiles deal 50% less Damage with Hits and Ailments
10% more Damage for each time this Skill has Chained
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have unholy resonance of lightning, physical and chaos, and to grant unholy resonance of damage types other than the highest one in a hit. There is a maximum of 50 unholy resonance for each damage type. Cannot support triggered skills, instant skills, orb skills, brands, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Hits with Supported Skills for which the highest Damage Type is Lightning, Physical or Chaos cause you to gain 25 Unholy Resonance of the other types per second for 2 seconds
Lose 5 Unholy Resonance per second of each type you are not gaining
Supported Skills deal 7% more Damage per 10 of lowest Unholy Resonance
Supported Skills ignore Enemy Lightning and Chaos Resistance while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
Supported Skills ignore Enemy Physical Damage Reduction while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: It was a delicate balancing act for Malachai to ensure the loyalty
of his three students - each as ambitious as they were depraved.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports attack skills.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 60% more Maximum Attack Damage
Supported Skills deal 70% less Minimum Attack Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports melee attack skills, making them repeat three times when used, targeting a random enemy each time. Cannot support Vaal skills, channelling skills, travel skills, retaliation skills or triggered skills.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 55% more Melee Attack Speed
Supported Skills deal 20% less Attack Damage
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Melee Damage
First Repeat of Supported Skills deals 22% more Damage
Second Repeat of Supported Skills deals 44% more Damage
Third Repeat of Supported Skills deals 66% more Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Zana watched in awe as her father spoke. With each word,
he seemed to grow larger and more frightening, drawing
increasingly fervorous responses from his rapt audience.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports melee strike skills, causing them to also strike at extra targets simultaneously. The extra targets must be a minimum distance from the user. If supporting a minion attack skill, the minion's skills will not also strike extra targets. Cannot support Vaal skills or triggered skills.
explicitMods: Supported Strike Skills target 3 additional nearby Enemies
Extra Targets for Supported Skills can be found 50% further away
Supported Skills deal 11% increased Melee Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "I believe the Halls of the Dead are secretly a
training ground. One day, we will be called
forth to stand and fight against a great tide."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports projectile skills, making their projectiles fork into two projectiles the first two times they hit an enemy and don't pierce it.
explicitMods: Projectiles from Supported Skills can Fork an additional Time

Projectiles from Supported Skills have 60% chance for an additional
Projectile when Forking
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Projectile Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Lioneye earned his moniker by killing
three men with a single arrow.

name: Replica Dreamfeather
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
flavourText: "Once we armoured the test subject heavily enough to test Prototype #502, he proceeded
to fight his way out. I don't know what we expected."
- Researcher Graven

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses a single enemy, increasing the damage they take from projectiles, and making projectiles split when hitting them, to hit other targets around them. You can only have one Mark at a time.
socketedItems.builtInSupport: Supported by Level 1 Mark On Hit
explicitMods: Cursed enemies take 34% increased Damage from Projectile Hits
Projectiles which Hit Cursed Enemies Split towards 2 additional targets
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell skill will track damage you take, and be triggered when the total damage taken reaches a threshold. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.
explicitMods: This Gem can only Support Skill Gems requiring Level 38 or lower
Trigger Supported Spells when you take 528 total Damage from Hits
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Fire, Physical, Vaal, Guard

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that adds to your armour, and can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. When the buff expires or is depleted, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken from the buff. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

75% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to 10% of your Armour, up to a maximum of 5000
Reflects 530% of Damage taken from Buff as Fire Damage when Buff expires or is depleted
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Modifiers to Skill Effect Duration also apply to this Skill's Soul Gain Prevention

36% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to 20% of your Armour, up to a maximum of 10000

Reflects 1590% of Damage taken from Buff as Fire Damage each second,
or when Buff expires or is depleted
hybrid.secDescrText: Applies a buff that raises your armour, and takes some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. Each second, the skill deals reflected damage to surrounding enemies based on the damage taken by the buff in that second. When the buff is removed, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken by the buff. You cannot have the buff at the same time as any other Guard skill.

craftedMods: 12% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill

socketedItems.secDescrText: Performs a melee attack, and causes lightning to strike a nearby enemy, dealing damage in an area. Each target can only be hit once by this skill. Hitting an enemy grants an aura for a duration. Requires a Sword, Axe, Mace, Sceptre, Staff or Unarmed.
explicitMods: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
Aura grants 13 to 239 added Lightning Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

Aura makes Smite strike +1 target with lightning
Aura grants 19 to 358 added Lightning Damage
hybrid.secDescrText: Calls lightning down to infuse your weapon, then performs a melee attack and causes lightning to strike nearby enemies, dealing damage in an area. Hitting an enemy grants an aura for a duration. Requires a Sword, Axe, Mace, Sceptre, Staff or Unarmed.

but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

explicitMods: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy

The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom
